title: Debt Flesh
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a city where every organ is leased and default means surgical repossession, a woman with 43 months of arrears hidden in her bones must outrun collection drones to find out why her mother's neural backup is broadcasting classified data from beyond the grave.
long_description: In a city where every organ is leased and default means surgical repossession, a woman with 43 months of arrears hidden in her bones must outrun collection drones to find out why her mother's neural backup is broadcasting classified data from beyond the grave.
